response.global_analysis: 1. Reference Match: Audio matches Japanese lyrics for 'Closing'. 2. Talk Segment: Manually transcribed Kobo's bilingual English/Japanese talk and merch reveal. 3. Timing: Synchronized precisely to vocal starts and ends.

subtitles.original: さあ 顔を上げて
歩み始めなきゃ
リアルな私よ
気付いて
また あの季節 この空の下
subtitles.english: Under this sky once again in that season...

subtitles.original: 見上げている
傷付いたもの もう元には
戻らないけど定義
離したくない
subtitles.english: I don't want to let go

subtitles.original: 離れたくない
もう諦めない
あなたの心 傷付けてでも
subtitles.english: Even if I hurt your heart...

subtitles.original: この気持ち 嘘はつけない
いつか笑顔で 話せるような
私を見つけて
ただそばにいて 聞かせてほしい
subtitles.english: Just stay by my side, I want to hear...

subtitles.original: 二度と一人には しないと
subtitles.english: ...that you'll never leave me alone again

subtitles.original: 帰らない日々 抱きしめたまま
subtitles.english: Holding on to the days that will never return

subtitles.original: きっと そう きっと
あの日の気持ち 受け止めないと
subtitles.english: If I don't accept the feelings of that day...

subtitles.original: 前に進むことができない
離したくない
subtitles.english: I don't want to let go

subtitles.original: 離れたくない
一つの願いは
大好きだよと 伝えたいだけ
subtitles.english: ...is that I just want to tell you that I love you

subtitles.original: 本当 素直じゃないけれど
So... How is it, guys?
Mmm, that was Closing.
Did you take a lot of screenshots? Ooh!
subtitles.english: Did you take a lot of screenshots? Ooh!

subtitles.original: And, ah, how about my new stage?
subtitles.english: And, ah, how about my new stage?

subtitles.original: Woah!
It's very cloudy here.
Yeah, as you can see, there's two big pictures on the left and right.
subtitles.english: Yeah, as you can see, there's two big pictures on the left and right.

subtitles.original: Mmm, so cute, right? みんなどうだった？ こぼのパフォーマンス！
subtitles.english: Mmm, so cute, right? How was Kobo's performance, everyone?

subtitles.original: いっぱいスクリーンショット撮れたかな？
subtitles.english: I wonder if you got a lot of screenshots?

subtitles.original: こぼの新しいステージはもうどうだった？可愛いでしょ？
subtitles.english: How was Kobo's new stage? Cute, right?

subtitles.original: Big picturesがありますので、めちゃ可愛いよね？
subtitles.english: Since there are big pictures, it's super cute, right?

subtitles.original: Mmm, so, actually...
Yeah, we're already at the end of the show, guys, but...
subtitles.english: Yeah, we're already at the end of the show, guys, but...

subtitles.original: そろそろお別れの時間になりますよ。
subtitles.english: ...it is almost time for us to part.

subtitles.original: But don't worry, mmm...
Kobo still has something to share with you guys. まだ皆さんにお知らせがあります！
subtitles.english: Kobo still has an announcement to share with you guys!

subtitles.original: じゃん！ じゃじゃーん！
Wee! Kobo Kanaeru Special Birthday 2025 Merch Set!
subtitles.english: Yay! Kobo Kanaeru Special Birthday 2025 Merch Set!

subtitles.original: This time, Kobo's birthday merch theme is Jellyfish Princess...
subtitles.english: This time, Kobo's birthday merch theme is Jellyfish Princess...
